title: K-200 Systems Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Systems Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-448-E. Revision: E. Type: specification. Author: Rowan Ellery. Created: 2025-02-28. Last modified: 2025-06-27. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1004.
